verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There flows from Calvary a stream For every sinner's pain, And he that drinketh, Jesus said, Shall never thirst again.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: What! never thirst again? No, never thirst again; What! never thirst again? No, never thirst again, For he that drinketh, Jesus said, Shall never, never thirst again.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Earth's fountains fair, But mock our souls, Like desert phantoms lure, And they that drink, the fainter grow, The keener thirst endure.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: This stream from Calvary still flows, To bless and cleanse and heal, And he that drinketh, Jesus said, New life and rest shall feel.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Oh, blessed stream of pure delight! Oh, balm for ev'ry pain! To thee I haste, for Jesus said, I'll never thirst again.
